settings.title: Check-in & Check-out
settings.text:
Check-in: 3:00 PM

Check-out: 11:00 AM

Early check-in and late check-out available on request.

settings.title: What is included in the room rate?
settings.text: Every room includes a full breakfast each morning, high-speed Wi-Fi, free on-site parking, and access to the gardens and common areas. Bath products are locally made and refreshed daily.

settings.title: Do you allow pets?
settings.text: Small dogs are welcome in the Garden Room and the Orchard Room for an additional fee of $35 per night. Please let us know when booking so we can prepare the room.

settings.title: What is your cancellation policy?
settings.text: Cancellations made more than 48 hours before check-in receive a full refund. Cancellations within 48 hours are charged 50% of the first night's rate. No-shows are charged the full first night.

settings.title: Is the property accessible?
settings.text: The Garden Room and the Orchard Room are on the ground floor with step-free access from the parking area. The common areas, dining room, and garden are all accessible. Please contact us with specific needs and we will do our best to accommodate.

settings.title: Can we host a small event?
settings.text: We welcome small gatherings of up to 30 guests. The garden is a beautiful setting for ceremonies and celebrations. Contact us to discuss availability and arrangements.
